case_title: TENING CHANG, M.D. PH.D VS. BONNIE FLORES

DECLARATION: IN OPPOSITION TO PLTFF'S COMPLAINT/IN SUPPORT OF DEFT. FILED. DEFT'S DECLARATION: WITH TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE GRANTED, DECLARATIONS REQUIRED BY COURT.

DEFENDANT MAY REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE BY PROVIDING A CONTACT NUMBER IN ADVANCE OF THE COURT DATE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. DEFENDANT APPEARED BY TELEPHONE. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHANG, M.D. PH.D, TENING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FLORES, BONNIE THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WAS SETTLED BY COMPROMISE IN THE SUM OF $1300.00, IN THAT DEFENDANT TENDERED FUNDS TO SATISFY THE SETTLEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
